title: CharacterSize
description: A beginner-made mod that lets you change your character’s size with keybinds. Grow up to 3× or shrink to 0.5× with real-time scaling. Larger size boosts speed, reach, and enables area block breaking. Ability based on scale, giving flexible and fun control
body:
Character Size Mod

This mod lets you dynamically change your character's size using simple keybinds. As you grow, you gain powerful abilities that scale with your size:

Dynamic Scaling – Press G to increase size (up to 3×) and H to decrease (down to 0.5×). Your player model, hitbox, and eye height update in real time.
Enhanced Mobility & Reach – Larger characters move faster and have extended attack, block interaction, and entity interaction ranges, making combat and building more effective.
Area Breaking – When you’re large enough, breaking one block also breaks adjacent blocks in a square area around it, clearing terrain faster with each swing.
All abilities scale smoothly with your chosen size, giving you full control over your character’s power and presence.
